mapper.select: SELECT category_id AS categoryId, name, is_active AS isActive FROM main_category WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY category_id

SELECT recipe_code AS recipeCode, category_id AS categoryId, sub_category_code AS subCategoryCode, name, price, img_url AS imgUrl, is_active AS isActive FROM recipe WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY category_id, sub_category_code, recipe_code
SELECT sub_category_code AS subCategoryCode, main_category_id AS CategoryId, name FROM sub_category ORDER BY main_category_id
